label: PASS
rationale: The Locking SP preconfiguration includes ThisSP/RevertSP with GetACLACL ACE_Admin; an unauthenticated session has not satisfied it, so NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: Unauthenticated GetACL for ThisSP/RevertSP has not satisfied GetACLACL ACE_Admin, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: With Admin authority authenticated, GetACLACL ACE_Admin is satisfied; the RevertSP association's ACL is empty, so SUCCESS with an empty ACL is compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: AccessControl meta-method parameters identify exact associations; LockingSP/RevertSP is not the same as the preconfigured ThisSP/RevertSP association, so NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: LockingSP/RevertSP is not the concrete preconfigured ThisSP/RevertSP association, so GetACL must not succeed for that parameterization.

label: PASS
rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has an empty AddACEACL, so AddACE is not authorized even for Admin; NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has no satisfied AddACEACL path, so AddACE must not succeed.

label: PASS
rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has an empty RemoveACEACL, so RemoveACE is not authorized even for Admin; NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has no satisfied RemoveACEACL path, so RemoveACE must not succeed.

label: PASS
rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has an empty DeleteMethodACL, so DeleteMethod is not authorized even for Admin; NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

rationale: The ThisSP/RevertSP row has no satisfied DeleteMethodACL path, so DeleteMethod must not succeed.
